title: Gooseberry Mesa Part 2 (for Colin at least)
summary:
After a grocery resupply and laundry in Hurricane, we headed up to Gooseberry Mesa. The Gooseberry mesa and nice dispersed camping. We found a nice little spot next to the edge of the mesa with some good trees for a hammock, which have been sparse in our desert camping spots. We spent some time reading before going on a short evening run.

The next morning we went on a mountain bike ride from camp. It was a little techy for me, I had to get off my bike and walk quite a lot and had two near-crashes, but it was fun and beautiful, and Maya and I survived! That night we did some more hammock reading, I made a sesame noodle salad and we watched one of my few downloaded movies from years ago, Fools Gold. Before we left our spot on Gooseberry Mesa, we decided to take advantage of our private campsite and took an outdoor shower! Other than trying to conserve water and having to hold the shower head for each other, the outdoor shower set up is pretty nice.

-Helen

photos.caption: Colin clawing his way out of a deep, deep fissure.
